result: The data has been cleaned and preprocessed according to the specified instructions. The input tab-delimited files were loaded, merged by NSID, and the variable `lang` was consolidated across four waves (S1-S4) using the prioritization logic for time-invariant characteristics. Missing value codes were harmonized to the standard codes (-9, -8, -1, -3, -2) and the final dataset containing only `NSID` and the consolidated `lang` variable was saved to `data/output/cleaned_data.csv`.
